title: Tanzanian Company Tech Stack
description: Schema for a stack.json entry describing the technical stack of a Tanzanian company.

industry.description: Sector the company operates in. Must match the parent folder under /sectors.

frontend.description: Frontend technologies (frameworks, libraries, languages). Use an empty array if not applicable.

database.description: Databases and data stores (SQL, NoSQL, cache, search).

cloud_infra.description: Cloud providers, orchestration, and infrastructure tooling.

mobile_tech.description: Mobile technologies. Use an empty array if the company has no mobile product.

sources.description: Proof of stack. Required for all entries submitted to the registry.

last_verified.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the entry was last confirmed.
